results.title: Gov't merit scholarship: How to apply for up to ₱120K educational aid
results.description: CEBU CITY, Philippines — The Bagong Pilipinas Merit Scholarship Program (BPMSP) is now accepting applications from incoming college and technical-vocational students who meet academic and income requirements. Successful applicants may receive tuition support, stipends, and allowances worth up to ₱120,000 annually depending on their chosen scholarship track. Applications will be accepted until June 30, 2026, [...]... Keep on reading: Gov't merit scholarship: How to apply for up to ₱120K educational aid

results.title: South Africa Stun South Korea to Make World Cup History
results.description: South Africa beat South Korea 1-0 on Wednesday to reach the World Cup knockout rounds for the first time in their history -- an astonishing turnaround after a dismal opening defeat. The Bafana Bafana, playing in a World Cup for the first time since they hosted it in 2010, were widely written off after their 2-0 loss to Group A winners Mexico in the tournament's curtainraiser, said AFP.
